/usr/bin/ar qc libnvcs_core.a CMakeFiles/nvcs_core.dir/src/util/hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs_core.dir/src/util/compress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs_core.dir/src/util/fs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs_core.dir/src/core/object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs_core.dir/src/core/blob.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs_core.dir/src/core/tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs_core.dir/src/core/commit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs_core.dir/src/core/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs_core.dir/src/core/refs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs_core.dir/src/core/repository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs_core.dir/src/net/protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs_core.dir/src/net/transport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nvcs_core.dir/src/version_system.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libnvcs_core.a
